_meta.oracle: ГРУЗ и ВАГОН (gruzivagon.info) free online RZD tariff calculator
_meta.regulatoryBasis: Прейскурант 10-01 with current indexation; calculator default date = today (08.06.2026). ET699 reproduces 2026 receipt to the RUBLE, so the oracle's period == the receipts' period (ТР-1 2026 era).
_meta.confidence: sourced-unofficial (independent third-party calculator, not РЖД ЭТРАН)
_meta.method: curl + session cookie jar + custom image-captcha solved by reading /captcha.php GIF (digits 2202). Payload md5-hash gate replicated (md5 of exact JSON.stringify string). NO browser needed; raw JSON response saved.

cases.cargo: Щебень не поименованный в алфавите (ЕТСНГ 232431, class 1)
cases.finding: Oracle provozная плата 75307 ₽/wagon does NOT reproduce the receipt 75т-innovative tier 70477 ₽. KEY relationship: 75307 × 0.9346 = 70382 ≈ 70477 (Δ ~95 ₽, 0.13%). 0.9346 is exactly one of the receipt-pipeline coefficients in the engine formula. So the oracle computes a base WITHOUT the innovative ×0.9595 discount AND without the ×0.9346 factor the engine applies; once 0.9346 is applied the oracle lands within 0.13% of the innovative receipt rate. The oracle has NO wagon-model input, so it cannot apply the innovative discount — this is consistent with lever #1 (innovative assignment) being a real per-wagon distinction the oracle ignores. The 2444 km distance is confirmed EXACT by the oracle.

cases.cargo: Щебень не поименованный в алфавите (ЕТСНГ 232431, class 1)
cases.note: This row (data=225829) was already present in the oracle's shared result list (another agent submitted it). Read as independent confirmation.
cases.finding: Oracle provozная плата = 31 224,00 ₽/wagon = receipt EXACTLY (187344/6). Distance 699 km EXACT. This INDEPENDENTLY CONFIRMS lever #2: the 699 km short-haul value the engine reproduces via a fitted K4 uplift (1.0057499686...) is the CORRECT chargeable value — a free third-party РЖД calculator returns the identical 31224 ₽. The fitted K4 is therefore numerically validated (the engine's output matches an independent oracle to the ruble), even though the verbatim п.16.7 row remains unconfirmed.

conclusions.ET699_lever2: CONFIRMED to the ruble (31224 ₽). The 699 km short-haul K4 fit produces the verifiably correct chargeable value.
conclusions.EF2444_pipeline: PARTIAL. Distance 2444 km confirmed. Per-wagon NOT reproduced: oracle 75307 ₽ vs receipt-innovative 70477 ₽. The gap is structurally explained — the oracle lacks innovative-model and the engine's ×0.9346 factor; 75307×0.9346=70382≈70477 (0.13%). This SUPPORTS lever #1: the innovative discount is a real per-wagon effect a model-blind calculator cannot capture, so resolving wagon NUMBER→MODEL remains the way to source it (oracle cannot).
conclusions.honesty: EF leg is described in the brief as SOURCED-to-the-ruble via the receipt itself; the ORACLE cross-check does NOT reproduce 1067770 because the oracle does not model innovative wagons. This is a real, expected divergence, not an engine error — the engine's receipt-calibrated 70477/72005/73452 tiers remain the authoritative per-wagon values.
